title: Featured Projects
description: These are some of the projects I would like to highlight:

projects.ambienteControlado: System responsible for receiving, storing, managing and displaying data from different types of sensors.
projects.worktrack: Fleet/salesperson tracking and route management system.
projects.roomsafe: Traceability system for cleaning rooms and/or environments.
projects.jardinesPatagonicos: Static institutional page that shows the services of the institution.
projects.soaptrack: Ticketing and alert system for the status of hand dispensers.
